text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the matcha I received recently has<n>the most
lovely scent.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I'll have some tea today.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I should still have some leftover treats<n>from my
mother that are perfect for<n>tea...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Mhm... Hehe, I can't wait to get back.
